text.title: Scrum Ceremonies Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team meet the Scrum applies-if preconditions (cross-functional, 3-9, incremental delivery)?

conclusion.verdict: Use Kanban or Lean Discovery flow

branch.when: preconditions == true AND sprint_length is null

conclusion.verdict: Negotiate sprint length (1/2/4 wk) before planning
Run a refinement session before Planning
Run Planning; gate on falsifiable sprint goal

example.trace: preconditions=true → backlog_ready_ratio=2.0 → run Planning gated on falsifiable goal.
